raw_consumer_statement: I booked a hotel with my Citibank visa card XX/XX/year>. I cancelled within three minutes of the booking when I realized that was a mistake. I got a cancellation letter from the merchant right away in the same day. The hotel was for XXXX. I didnt see a refund to my account so I contacted Citibank XX/XX/year>. They didnt ask any supporting documents and just tell me to wait. I just got a denial letter from them stating the merchant has a Non- refundable policy. I didnt understand that. They didnt stated clearly on the cancellation letter.
